title: PROC_ARST can not identify the async reset

features.name: async reset with dynamic array index in reset branch
features.description: Code should include an always block with async reset sensitivity that assigns to an unpacked array element using a non-constant (dynamic) index in the reset branch
features.snippet:
reg test[0:1];
always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if (!rst_n) test[sel] <= 0;
